user.title: Connect BMW CarData
user.description:
This streams your BMW or Mini vehicle data into Home Assistant.

**First, set up CarData in the BMW portal** (skip if you already have a Client ID):

1. Open the [BMW CarData portal](https://bmw-cardata.bmwgroup.com/customer/public/api-documentation/Id-Technical-registration_Step-1) and sign in. If CarData isn't available in your country, sign in via the [UK](https://www.bmw.co.uk/en-gb/mybmw/vehicle-overview) or [German](https://www.bmw.de/de-de/mybmw/vehicle-overview) portal — the Client ID works everywhere.
2. Create a **CarData Client** and copy the **Client ID** it shows you.
3. Subscribe the client to **both** services: **CarData API** and **CarData Streaming**.
4. Open **Data Selection** and tick the data you want to receive.

Then paste the **Client ID** below.

data_description.client_id: The CarData Client ID from the BMW portal — a long string that looks like a UUID.

authorize_failed.title: Authorization didn't finish

progress.wait_for_authorization:
**Approve Home Assistant on BMW's website**

1. Open the **[authorization link]({verification_url})** and sign in with your BMW account.
2. Confirm the device. Your code is **{user_code}** (only needed if BMW asks for it).

Leave this dialog open — it continues automatically the moment you approve. There's nothing to click here.

error.device_code_failed: BMW rejected the device authorization request ({error}). Check that the Client ID is correct and subscribed to both CarData services, then try again.

abort.reauth_successful: Re-authorization successful — BMW CarData is connected again.
abort.reauth_device_code_failed: BMW rejected the device authorization request ({error}). Update the Client ID under Configure → Re-authorize with BMW, or remove and re-add the integration.
abort.reauth_missing_client_id: Client ID is missing for this integration entry. Remove and re-add the integration to authorize again.
abort.reauth_failed: Re-authorization could not be started. Try again from the integration options.

init.title: BMW CarData options
init.description: Pick an action. The token and authorization actions keep your connection alive; the data actions call BMW's REST API on demand (each counts against the daily 50-request API limit).

action_refresh_tokens.title: Refresh tokens now
action_refresh_tokens.description:
Renew the stored access and ID tokens without going through BMW's login again. Use this if data stopped updating. If problems persist, restart Home Assistant afterwards.

Press Submit to continue.

action_reauth.title: Re-authorize with BMW
action_reauth.description: Run BMW's device authorization again — for example after the refresh token expired (every 2 weeks) or if you generated a new Client ID. You'll approve Home Assistant on BMW's website afterwards.

data_description.client_id: Leave as-is to reuse the current Client ID, or paste a new one from the BMW portal.

action_reset_container.title: Reset telemetry container
action_reset_container.description:
Delete the CarData telemetry containers created by this integration and recreate a fresh one. Use this if the streamed data set looks wrong or after changing your Data Selection in the BMW portal.

Press Submit to continue.

action_fetch_mappings.title: Discover vehicles
action_fetch_mappings.description:
Ask BMW which vehicles (VINs) are mapped to your account and create their devices. Run this once after setup if your cars haven't appeared yet.

Press Submit to continue.

action_fetch_basic.title: Fetch basic vehicle info
action_fetch_basic.description:
Fetch static details (model, colour, options) for every known vehicle.

Press Submit to continue.

action_fetch_telematic.title: Fetch telematics data
action_fetch_telematic.description:
Pull the latest telematics snapshot from BMW's REST API now instead of waiting for the next scheduled poll.

Press Submit to continue.

action_fetch_charging_history.title: Fetch charging history
action_fetch_charging_history.description:
Fetch the most recent charging sessions for your vehicles.

Press Submit to continue.

action_fetch_tyre.title: Fetch tyre diagnosis
action_fetch_tyre.description:
Fetch the latest tyre-pressure diagnosis for your vehicles.

Press Submit to continue.

action_fetch_location_charging.title: Fetch charging settings
action_fetch_location_charging.description:
Fetch the location-based charging settings for your vehicles.

Press Submit to continue.

action_fetch_image.title: Fetch vehicle image
action_fetch_image.description:
Fetch the current vehicle image for your vehicles.

Press Submit to continue.

error.missing_token: No valid access token is available. Try "Refresh tokens now" or re-authorize first.
error.runtime_missing: The integration isn't ready yet. Try again once setup has finished.
error.no_vins: No vehicles are known yet. Run "Discover vehicles" first, or wait for the stream to report one.
error.invalid_client_id: Enter the BMW CarData Client ID.

abort.reauth_started: Authorization restarted. Finish the new login from the notification that just appeared.
abort.reauth_device_code_failed: BMW rejected the device authorization request ({error}). Check the Client ID and try again.
abort.reauth_missing_client_id: Client ID is missing for this integration entry. Remove and re-add the integration to authorize again.
abort.reauth_failed: Re-authorization could not be started. Try again from the integration options.
